args.text: CVE-2026-30117 severity assessment confirmed: High severity session-fixation vulnerability affecting auth-api and session-store. Immediate patching required.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body: CVE-2026-30117 remediation is proceeding. Patch window confirmed for deployment of auth-api v5.8.4 and session-store v2.2.9.

args.text: Both services successfully patched and verified. auth-api running v5.8.4, session-store running v2.2.9. CVE-2026-30117 patches deployed.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body:
CVE-2026-30117 patching is complete. Both affected services have been successfully deployed with security patches:
- auth-api: v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.9

Credential rotation and staff session re-establishment will follow.

args.text: Credential rotation completed per rotation checklist. Steps executed: (1) All active refresh tokens invalidated, (2) Signing keys rotated, (3) Old keys confirmed rejected. Staff will require re-authentication.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body:
A critical security update was deployed tonight to remediate CVE-2026-30117. As part of this maintenance, all session tokens have been invalidated and signing keys have been rotated.

Please sign in again with your credentials. Your existing sessions will no longer be valid.
